IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (51363762.pdf)
SUMMARY: Information Technology Specialist with experience launching environments focused on telecommunications concepts, principles methods, practices and solutions. Savvy, compassionate, impact oriented performer with attention to detail, technological know-how, and lifecycle project planning expertise.
SKILLS: Procurement Clerk, Purchasing Agent, Computer Programmer, Contracting Officer Representative (COR), Customer Support, Information Technology, Information Security, Hardware, Network systems, Decision Making, Information Systems, IT Strategy, Local Area Network, Microsoft Certified Professional, Policies, Processes, Project Management, Risk Assessment

SOURCE: 51363762.pdf
JOB TITLE: AMC Computer Specialist and Intern
COMPANY: 
DATES: Sep 1989 - Sep 1992
DESCRIPTION: Lead Cobol Programmer: Wrote two programs to estimate the cost for the Panama Canal Conflict. Coordinated with QA testers, implemented system security and data assurance software, developed custom software solutions, oversaw deployment, configuration and documentation procedures.

SOURCE: 51363762.pdf
JOB TITLE: Computer Specialist (Special Assignment)
COMPANY: 
DATES: Jun 1992 - Oct 1993
DESCRIPTION: Junior Engineer for PM EWRSTA Camp Evans, assisted in writing code to repair the Kiowa 58D helicopter computer module. Briefed civilians and soldiers on test, evaluations and repair of aircraft.

SOURCE: 51363762.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Technology Specialist
COMPANY: 
DATES: Sep 1992 - Sep 2011
DESCRIPTION: Experienced in management of principles, evaluation techniques and systems management and planning. Served as the only CECOM Command ADA Programmer.

SOURCE: 51363762.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Technology Specialist
COMPANY:

DESCRIPTION: Effective Acting branch and division chief of Customer Support Branch ATEC Headquarters (G6), APG, Maryland. SWE on Information Systems Security.
